# SSL_DH_anon_EXPORT_WITH_RC4_40_MD5

**Global Variable**

Session key size conforms to pre-1998 US export restrictions.

## Declaration

```swift
var SSL_DH_anon_EXPORT_WITH_RC4_40_MD5: SSLCipherSuite { get }
```
